titleStmt.title: SII 38.544: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 544. (A.R. No. 544 of 1912.) TIRUNĪRMALAI, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPET DISTRICT. On the south wall, Nīrvaṇṇar perumāḷ shrine, Raṅganātha perumāḷ temple.

p.hi: King: Rājarājadēva III Year 16, Dhanus, śu. di. 5. Sunday, Aviṭṭam = November 30, 1231 A.D.

summary.p: Records a gift of 1(3/4) paḻaṅkāśu by Aruḷāḷap-Perumāḷ Śīyaṉ (a resident) of Peruṅgaṉalvaṭṭam, for burning a twilight lamp to the god at Tirunīrmalai. The priest of the temple, Āsūri Malaikiṉiya-niṉṟāṉ Bhaṭṭaṉ of Bhāradvāja gōtra, received the gift and agreed to maintain the lamp perpetually.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī Irācarācatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 6vatu danunāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu pañcami
yum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aviṭṭattu nāḷ tirunirmalai Emperumāṉukkup peruṅkaṉalvaṭ
ṭam pākkiḻāṉ Aruḷāḷapperumāḷ ciyaṉ vaitta canti viḷakku 1 cantiviḷakkoṉṟukku Ikkoyiṟ
kāṇiyuṭaiya nampimāril bhāradvāji Āsuri malaikiṉiyaniṉṟāṉ bhaṭṭaṉ kaikkoṇṭa paḻaṅ
kācu 1mukkāl Ippaḻaṅkācu Oṉṟemukkāluṅ koṇṭu Ittiruviḷakku cantirātittavarai celuttak kaṭave
ṉ malaikiṉiyaniṉṟāṉbhaṭṭaneṉ .
Digital edition of SII 38.544 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
